overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a morning walk through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The player character moves along sidewalks past commercial buildings, transitioning from covered walkways to open streets with moderate traffic and prominent digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with electronics shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered sidewalk beneath building overhangs, passing neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: large red neon sign for electronics store with glowing letters
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and horizontal lines
building overhang providing partial cover over the sidewalk
yellow neon sign for Mark 24 shop

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial walkway beneath tall office buildings. Neon signs for electronics shops line the right side while sparse traffic moves on the street to the left. The area is semi-covered with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with pawn shop and digital advertising

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit street with direct sunlight and full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to a wider street with more direct sunlight

notable_agents.action: black car driving past on the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with yellow signage reading El Dorado Pawn Shop
tall vertical digital display with colorful pyramid graphic and neon colors
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the covered walkway ends, revealing a sunlit urban street. The El Dorado Pawn Shop appears on the right while a large digital billboard dominates the distant view. Traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with large digital advertisements and illuminated trees

events.description: several cars drive past on the left side of the street in moderate traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing pedestrians and approaching large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking along the sidewalk
child in blue shirt running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large purple digital billboard featuring a celebrity advertisement with neon text
tree with pink illuminated blossoms on the sidewalk
row of shops with colorful neon signage across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking through a bustling commercial area with moderate pedestrian traffic. Large digital billboards including one for Lizzy Wizzy dominate the right side, while pink illuminated trees line the sidewalk. The street features moderate vehicle traffic and various neon-lit storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with construction barriers and color-shifting illuminated panels

events.description: enters narrow walkway with construction barriers on the left and glowing color-shifting wall panels on the right

agents.ego_description: entering a narrower passage with construction barriers on the left and glowing panels on the right, following a child running ahead

notable_agents.action: child in blue shirt running ahead into the narrow passage

entered.detail: yellow and red construction fencing with barbed wire on top
tall illuminated wall panels shifting colors from green to yellow to red
enclosed walkway leading between buildings with reduced width

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow passage flanked by construction barriers on the left and large glowing panels on the right that shift colors from green to yellow to red. The space becomes more enclosed with reduced sky visibility, and the character follows a child running ahead toward a more open area at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial corridor into a vibrant, sunlit urban center before narrowing into a colorful industrial passage. It begins along a semi-covered walkway beneath towering office buildings, passing neon electronics shops while sparse traffic flows on the adjacent street. As the walkway ends, the scene opens into a bright, sunlit street featuring the El Dorado Pawn Shop and a massive digital billboard looming in the distance. The camera then moves through a bustling commercial district characterized by pink illuminated trees and towering advertisements for Lizzy Wizzy, before shifting into a narrow passage flanked by construction barriers. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera follows a running child past large glowing panels that cycle through green, yellow, and red light toward a distant opening.
